violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the special's menu that are raw or undercooked (eggs benedict). New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Cooling procedures reviewed with person in charge. Foods moved to shallow pans to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Proper food storage was discussed and Food item storage was adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Per the PIC, three bay sink to be used for proper sanitizing until dish machine is serviced. Call was made for service at the time of inspection. Tech to arrive same day. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, Potatoes were placed hot in containers greater than four inches deep for cooling. Methods for rapid cooling were discussed with the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Salmon was observed thawed in the single door cooler in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Based on temperature observed at the time of inspection of 37 degrees Fahrenheit, Packages of Salmon were cut open. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
